rationale: The task requires naming both tactics clearly, but the response uses only ambiguous pronouns ('it', 'that', 'the other', 'this') and never identifies any tactic. The text contradicts itself ('the lemma above shows this, but the one below contradicts it') making the doc incoherent.
rubric_evidence: It applies after that, but only when the previous one fails.
The lemma above shows this, but the one below contradicts it in the obvious case.
So we recommend it, unless this happens — in which case use the other.
